scripts.predev:
node -e "const [maj,min]=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number);if(maj<20||(maj===20&&min<19)){console.error('
✗ Node '+process.version+' detected. Vite requires Node >=20.19 or >=22.12.
  Run: nvm use 22
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "api,web,agents" -c "cyan,magenta,green" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix app run dev" "AGENTS_ENV=dev-paid npm --prefix backend run start:agents"
scripts.infra:build: docker compose build postgres prometheus loki grafana
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose build postgres && docker compose up -d
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && docker compose build postgres && docker compose up -d
scripts.setup:dev: cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ .env created — fill in OPENROUTER_API_KEY and CLERK_SECRET_KEY before starting' || echo '✓ .env already exists'
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix app install
